title: anemone hortensis subsp. hortensis
intro: Anemone hortensis subsp. hortensis, commonly known as wood anemone, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Ranunculaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation, due to its content of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Anemone hortensis subsp. hortensis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in herbal medicine to create topical creams and ointments for skin issues.
